name: Midnight Centaur
description: A powerful centaur with dark horse features, clad in leather armor, standing in a misty moonlit forest.

name: Meadow Honey
description: A cheerful centaur with chestnut horse features, wearing a corset and off-shoulder blouse, standing in a sunny meadow.

name: Spring Hottie
